MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-23-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS ROGER WADE ESTEY, JR, JULIAN CHEN LIEN CHANG AND TAMSEN PLUME'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED. DEFENDANTS SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE BY DEMONSTRATING THAT THEY WERE BONA FIDE PURCHASERS WHO ACQUIRED THE PROPERTY WITHOUT ACTUAL OR CONSTRUCTIVE NOTICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. DEFENDANTS' DECLARATIONS FROM PRIOR OWNERS CONFIRMS DEFENDANTS LACK OF KNOWLEDGE. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PROVIDE EVIDENCE THAT CREATES A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. AS A CONSEQUENCE, DEFENDANTS ARE ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT AS A MATTER OF LAW. CIVIL CODE SECTION 19, SOUTHERN PACIFIC CO. V. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (1964) 62 CAL.2ND 50, 56-57; IN RE MARRIAGE OF CLONEY (2001) 91 CAL.APP.4TH 429, 437. COURT RULED ON DEFENDANTS EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS, ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

Off Calendar Jan-15-2009 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS ROGER WADE ESTEY, JR., JULIAN CHEN LIEN CHANG AND TAMSEN PLUME'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, ALTERNATIVELY, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.
APPEARANCES: John A. Kithas, Esq. & Chris Land, Esq. of Law Offices of John A. Kithas 788-8100 for pltf & opposing party; Michael S. Burke, Esq. & Mark Hostetter, Esq. of Vogl & Meredith LLP 398-0200 for defts & moving parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. DEFENDANTS SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE BY DEMONSTRATING THAT THEY WERE BONA FIDE PURCHASERS WHO ACQUIRED THE PROPERTY WITHOUT ACTUAL OR CONSTRUCTIVE NOTICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. DEFENDANTS' DECLARATIONS FROM PRIOR OWNERS CONFIRMS DEFENDANTS LACK OF KNOWLEDGE. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PROVIDE EVIDENCE THAT CREATES A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT. AS A CONSEQUENCE, DEFENDANTS ARE ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT AS A MATTER OF LAW. CIVIL CODE SECTION 19, SOUTHERN PACIFIC CO. V. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (1964) 62 CAL.2ND 50, 56-57; IN RE MARRIAGE OF CLONEY (2001) 91 CAL.APP.4TH 429, 437. Court ruled on defendants evidentiary objections, order signed. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
